chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1158 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.11.2022 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf respondents No.4, 5 and 6-University along with detail of outstanding amount/schedule of payment duly signed by respondent No.6, which reflects that an amount of Rs.12,97,977/- is outstanding towards commutation and financial assistance, which is payable by the respondents-University to the petitioner. Since the claim of the petitioner is admitted by the respondents-University, we dispose of this petition by directing the respondents-University to pay off the aforementioned dues to the petitioner within two months hereof. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
